title: Part Feeding Vision Calibration
description:
Part Feeding Vision Calibration

Vision Calibration

Perform vision calibration for the feeder platform surface.

For more information on how to perform vision calibration, refer to the following reference materials.

Vision Guide 8.0 (Ver. 8.0) Software  7. Vision Calibration

The following table list important properties for vision calibration.

Property	Configuration Method

Camera	Set
		 the camera number.

CameraOrienation	Set
		 the camera fixing method.

Fixed downward facing camera - Fixed downward

Mobile camera - Mobile J4 or Mobile J6

RobotLocal	Specify
		 the robot local number.

RobotNumber	Specify
		 the robot number.

Match this number to the robot number
		 set in 2.2.2  General.

RobotTool	Specify
		 the robot tool number.

If there are one or more feeders with backlights:
